local_results.title: Portland Art Museum
local_results.description: Asian, American & Native American art. Collection of Asian, American, Native American & European art, plus touring shows & film screenings.

local_results.title: OMSI
local_results.description: Planetarium & hands-on exhibits. Rotating shows, science labs, submarine tours & planetarium at a museum with monthly 21+ events.

local_results.title: The Freakybuttrue Peculiarium and Museum
local_results.description: Odd collection of exhibits, art & gifts. Museum featuring strange & creepy exhibits, artwork & merchandise (not recommended for children).

local_results.title: Oregon Jewish Museum and Center for Holocaust Education
local_results.description: History exhibits, events & tours. Venue offering rotating exhibits, lectures & films on Holocaust history, plus docent-led tours.

local_results.title: Portland Puppet Museum
local_results.description: Whimsical puppet exhibits & performances. Quaint place with fanciful puppets on display, live puppet shows & make-your-own puppet workshops.

local_results.title: Japanese American Museum of Oregon
local_results.address: 411 NW Flanders St Ste 100, Portland, OR 97209
local_results.description: Museum for Japanese-American history. Intimate museum with exhibits focusing on Japanese-American experiences in the 1940s.

local_results.title: Oregon Historical Society
local_results.description: Artifacts & exhibits about state history. Rotating exhibits give insight into state history, art & more in building with 8-story-high murals.

local_results.title: Oregon Rail Heritage Center
local_results.description: History museum with working trains. Indoor museum housing historic exhibits & multiple restored trains, some of which are operational.

local_results.title: Rice Northwest Museum of Rocks & Minerals
local_results.description: Galleries with geodes, gems & fossils. Geology museum displaying an array of geodes, gems, minerals, petrified wood, fossils & crystals.

local_results.title: World Forestry Center
local_results.description: Interactive exhibits on forests & trees. Hands-on exhibits are designed to teach visitors about the sustainability of forests & trees.

local_results.title: Oregon Maritime Museum
local_results.description: Tours of a restored steamer. Guided tours & educational exhibits on a historic steam-powered tug moored on the Willamette River.

local_results.title: Portland Police Museum and Historical Society
Hellenic-American Cultural Center & Museum of Oregon and SW Washington
Evergreen Aviation & Space Museum
local_results.address: 500 NE Captain Michael King Smith Way, McMinnville, OR 97128
local_results.description: World's largest airplane & a water park. Home to several historic aircraft, including the world's largest, plus a water park & 3D theater.
